html:
Exclusive to:

The Conspicuous Chest is a naturally spawning structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in the An Eye for An Eye update. It usually spawns in Forest biomes. There will be various loot inside the Conspicuous Chest, but it will always have a Terrarium that can be used to summon the Eye of Terror and Twins of Terror. Besides the special loot, it works identical to a Chest, and can be hammered down to get Boards. Once found, the Conspicuous Chest will display an icon on the Map. If it is found with Pig Torches around it the Guardian Pigs will turn into Werepigs and the Pig Torches will be put out upon opening the chest.

Conspicuous Chest contents
Item(s) Chance Quantity
100% 1
or or or or or or 100% 1
33% 1-3
or 33% 3-5
50% 1-2
50% 2-4
or 50% 1
50% 2-5
50% 6-15


Trivia

  • The Conspicuous Chest is introduced in the An Eye for An Eye update, as a crossover collaboration with Re-Logic's Terraria.
  • It resembles the Crimson Chest found in the Dungeon when Crimson generates in a world in Terraria.
  • The chest's contents (with the exception of the Terrarium) resemble the contents of a surface chest found in a typical Terraria world, with similar spawn rates.

Gallery

  • Conspicuous Chest surrounded by Guardian Pigs
  • Conspicuous Chest on Spider Den
  • Fire Trap version of Conspicuous Chest

“What harm ever came from peeking inside a box?”
–Wilson
“It'll be a nice place to put my stuff while I'm out burning.”
–Willow
“Is looking like normal chest without sparkles.”
–Wolfgang
“What terrible things hide within?”
–Wendy
“NEW CHEST VARIABLE DETECTED”
–WX-78
“I wonder how it came to be here.”
–Wickerbottom
“Looks just like any other chest now.”
–Woodie
“It's just my style.”
–Maxwell
“T'wöuld be a fine place tö keep my weapöns.”
–Wigfrid
“We didn't find any toys inside.”
–Webber
“It doesn't look quite so strange now, non?”
–Warly
“Shiny gone...”
–Wormwood
“Well, a free chest's a free chest.”
–Winona
“Extraordinarily ordinary!”
–Wortox
“It smell strange, not from here.”
–Wurt
“I wonder how it got here?”
–Walter
“Dimensional cross-contamination aside, it's quite a lovely chest.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Rương Dễ Thấy là một cấu trúc sinh sản tự nhiên dành riêng cho Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong bản cập nhật An Eye for An Eye. Nó thường sinh sản trong quần xã rừng. Sẽ có nhiều chiến lợi phẩm khác nhau bên trong Rương dễ thấy, nhưng nó sẽ luôn có một Terrarium có thể được sử dụng để triệu hồi Eye of Terror và Twins of Terror. Bên cạnh chiến lợi phẩm đặc biệt, nó hoạt động giống như một chiếc Rương và có thể được đập xuống để lấy Bảng. Sau khi được tìm thấy, Rương dễ thấy sẽ hiển thị một biểu tượng trên Bản đồ. Nếu nó được tìm thấy cùng với Đuốc Lợn xung quanh, Lợn canh gác sẽ biến thành Lợn Sói và Lợn…

The '''Conspicuous Chest''' is a naturally spawning structure exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in the ''[[An Eye for An Eye]]'' update. It usually spawns in [[Forest]] biomes. There will be various loot inside the Conspicuous Chest, but it will always have a [[Terrarium]] that can be used to summon the [[Eye of Terror]] and [[Twins of Terror]]. Besides the special loot, it works identical to a [[Chest]], and can be hammered down to get [[Boards]]. Once found, the Conspicuous Chest will display an icon on the [[Map]]. If it is found with [[Pig Torch]]es around it the [[Guardian Pig]]s will turn into [[Werepig]]s and the Pig Torches will be put out upon opening the chest.
